Video.summary: Clouds and sea roll in toward land.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Seascape Fantasy

Video.title: Enchanted Forest

Video.summary: Mountains overlook a peaceful autumn scene.

Video.title: Autumn Woods

Video.summary: Painting a golden sunset on a black canvas.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Golden Sunset

Video.summary: Bob Ross' son Steve demonstrates painting within an oval.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Oval

Video.summary: Bob paints detailed trees in winter.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Solitude

Video.summary: Painting the sun as it sets over a deserted beach.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Ocean Sunset

Video.summary: Bob paints a warm sun high in the sky to offset the cold mountainscape below.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Frost

Video.summary: Bob creates an effect using masking tape on the canvas as he paints the sky and mountains as a backdrop for a meadow, trees and a cabin.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Triple View

Video.summary: Bob paints a woodland scene complete with a small footbridge running across a creek.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Secluded Bridge

Video.summary: Bob Ross paints a forest landscape, featuring a stream, rock formations and trees.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Twin Falls

Video.summary: Creating a seascape using a half black, half white canvas.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Ocean Breeze
